title: Blue Disposable Vinyl Gloves Medium Size Pack of 100 Powder-Free, Latex-Free Hand Protection for Laboratory, Food Prep, Hygiene & Inspection Multipurpose Tasks Gloves
features: Each box contains 100 medium-sized Blue Vinyl Gloves for laboratory, food prep, and hygiene applications.
Powder-free, latex-free construction reduces irritation and prevents residue.
Smooth surface enhances grip and tactile control for precise handling tasks.
Flexible medium blue vinyl gloves, pack of 100, offer comfort for long-duration work.
Ideal for inspection, cleaning, food handling, and light industrial use.
description: Stay safe and clean with the Blue Vinyl Gloves Medium Size Pack of 100, perfect for lab work, food preparation, and hygiene inspections. These powder-free, latex-free gloves provide a secure fit while maintaining full tactile sensitivity. The medium size ensures comfort and dexterity, allowing precise control when handling delicate equipment or cleaning tasks. Resistant to tearing and oils, they provide reliable protection in medical, laboratory, kitchen, and workshop environments. This 100-count box gives you a convenient disposable solution that combines flexibility, durability, and professional hygiene standards.
